college_info.college_name: Pacific Medical University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Pacific Medical University is a private university in Udaipur, Rajasthan. The institute is approved by the INC, PCI and DCI. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 23 courses across 16 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Pacific Medical University programs include B.Sc., M.Sc., MD, MS and BDS. Pacific Medical University courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 265 students. The fees at Pacific Medical University ranges between INR 12,00,000 to 2,55,00,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College is good but the fee for MBBS course is very high.

review_content.Placements: To take admission in Pacific Medical College and Hospital for MBBS course, one need to qualify NEET UG examination by passing through Rajasthan State Counselling. We can take admission in this college even with 140-200 marks in NEET UG but the fees will be high.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are good including labs, classrooms, and faculty members are quite good. Wi-Fi is not provided by the college administration. Hostels are available with no air-conditioners. Each room contains 2 beds, one cupboard, a study table, and a chair for each student. A bathroom is attached to each room and a separate balcony is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Bit annoying and exhausting, but worth it.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not available. We have to do a complete 1 year internship in our hospitals. Then we can either do our private practise, or prepare for PG entrance exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have got 8 departments in our course. The mess and hostel facilities are good. We are not provided any air conditioners during summer, and we have 6 floors without any lift, in our hostels.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty includes the doctors themselves. Own study is better. We have internal exams, pre university, and then the main university exams in the year end, which will be difficult if you haven't studied. Passing marks are 50%.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pacific Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: I have observed that there is 100% placement guaranteed from our college because you have plenty of options like a medical officer, PG DNB, and diploma in other boards. You have the best role to offer in this course, which is to become a doctor and treat patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in a department are quite well built. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are up to the mark. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, and our mess serves three different vegetables and chapati along with buttermilk, achar, etc. When you live in a hospital, you don't need to worry about medical facilities. Sports like badminton, squash, cricket, table tennis, chess, ludo, and a big field for volleyball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pacific Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: It depends upon students' choice and interest that what they want to pursue in life, students will had to fight for the PC exam for a better future otherwise college will give students multiple options for placements. The students can opt for teaching or PG exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilitation and infrastructure were up to mark, but sometimes students will had to suffer for water and electricity due to some shortage, especially in summers, other than that the quality of facilities in our hostel was good. The quality of food available in our mess and canteen was fine. The medical facilities, sports, and games were good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college because of good faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in BDS. Our teachers and seniors help in placements. If you have good skills you will be chosen by your teachers to work at their set up or referred to work at a place by your senior. There are very less government jobs available for BDS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is very good. It is surrounded by hills. The environment is so soothing. Wi-Fi is available in college and not in hostels. There are two libraries, one is a medical library and the other is a dental library. Hostel rooms are big and very comfortable. There is an uninterrupted electricity supply.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college because having good knowledgeable faculty, really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Several Opportunities are there. But one should be good at his or her work. You can do a job in hospital, can open a clinic, can do research or can do practice under another dentist or you can become a surgeon. There are less government jobs available in this sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very nice. It lies at the base of the hill. The classrooms are very much comfortable. There are two different libraries in this college. One is Dental library and other is dental library. The hostel rooms are good and spacious. Electricity is always available. Drinking water is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A very disciplined and strict environment for good scores and high packages.

review_content.Placements: Have not heard enough but I am sure that more than 85 percent of a batch got placed, and many of them are students going abroad for further studies. Maximum package has been 16 LPA and the lowest I don't know but the average is somewhere around 8 LPA to 9 LPA, and also many students got PPO as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have any hostel, so if you are from another city you have to find a place to stay also. The labs are basic, no Wi-Fi, classrooms are not as shown in movies, normal classrooms like school, food quality is not that bad.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty's behaviour, the way of teaching, and to upgrade our skills.

review_content.Placements: More than 60 to 90 percent of students get admission, and package is also satisfactory. There are many companies for the best recruitment like Adani, Automobile, Tech companies, and many more. Good to learn, explore, and be offered better roles in our course. Performance is good here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has proper management and sports events like roadies and other sports events also available to develop your skills. Canteen is too good and properly managed. Tea post outlet in our college is also a proper and better place for students to stay free and enjoy their time.

reviews_list.review_title: Campus is well-equipped with decent placement opportunities, but faculty support could be better.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students from the 2025 batch are successfully placed. Around 100% of students secured internships. Companies offering internships include: High Court, Lower Court.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus, including classrooms and hostels, is Wi-Fi enabled with good internet speed. Students can access academic resources anytime. Classrooms are well-maintained, equipped with projectors, smart boards, and comfortable seating. Most are air-conditioned. The mess serves decent, hygienic food with a rotating menu (vegetarian and non-vegetarian options). The canteen and food courts offer various cuisines at affordable rates.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good in the college. You get an internship in the 3rd year with a stipend.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed, provided they don't have any backlogs. The highest package is around 14 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. TCS and other companies come for placements. Around 70% of students get internships at the start of the 3rd year in areas near the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-speed internet is available throughout the department and campus. The central library is well-stocked with textbooks, reference books, journals, and digital resources. It also offers a quiet and comfortable environment for studying and research.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: LJ College is one of the best colleges for MBA.

review_content.Placements: Many students have been placed from this institute in very good companies. The percentage of students placed in this college is 75%. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Kotak, HFFC, ITC, and Narmada. 80% of students got their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and the MBA course is also good to pursue. I recommend the college. The canteen food is delicious. The labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of facilities is top-notch. There is also a sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Practical learning feel like school for first 4 semesters, but provide good knowledge for this tier.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average but acceptable for a college at this level. Around 65-70% of students get placed each year. Companies like WebOccult, Tatvasoft, Codefox, and some local startups regularly recruit students. Many students also get internships through the college or on their own. Roles offered include software development, web development, QA tester, and support engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some labs are good, but due to the high student count and limited space, it often feels crowded. Though faculty manage it well. Classroom teaching is mostly traditional with whiteboards and markers, no projectors. There is no public Wi-Fi, and the library is average with basic resources. There is no hostel, but nearby PGs are easily available. The canteen is okay. I am not sure about medical support.

review_summary.college_name: Lok Jagruti University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A very disciplined and strict environment for good scores and high packages.

content.Placements: Have not heard enough but I am sure that more than 85 percent of a batch got placed, and many of them are students going abroad for further studies. Maximum package has been 16 LPA and the lowest I don't know but the average is somewhere around 8 LPA to 9 LPA, and also many students got PPO as well.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have any hostel, so if you are from another city you have to find a place to stay also. The labs are basic, no Wi-Fi, classrooms are not as shown in movies, normal classrooms like school, food quality is not that bad.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty's behaviour, the way of teaching, and to upgrade our skills.

content.Placements: More than 60 to 90 percent of students get admission, and package is also satisfactory. There are many companies for the best recruitment like Adani, Automobile, Tech companies, and many more. Good to learn, explore, and be offered better roles in our course. Performance is good here.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has proper management and sports events like roadies and other sports events also available to develop your skills. Canteen is too good and properly managed. Tea post outlet in our college is also a proper and better place for students to stay free and enjoy their time.

individual_reviews.title: Campus is well-equipped with decent placement opportunities, but faculty support could be better.

content.Placements: 80% of students from the 2025 batch are successfully placed. Around 100% of students secured internships. Companies offering internships include: High Court, Lower Court.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus, including classrooms and hostels, is Wi-Fi enabled with good internet speed. Students can access academic resources anytime. Classrooms are well-maintained, equipped with projectors, smart boards, and comfortable seating. Most are air-conditioned. The mess serves decent, hygienic food with a rotating menu (vegetarian and non-vegetarian options). The canteen and food courts offer various cuisines at affordable rates.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in the college. You get an internship in the 3rd year with a stipend.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed, provided they don't have any backlogs. The highest package is around 14 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. TCS and other companies come for placements. Around 70% of students get internships at the start of the 3rd year in areas near the college.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed internet is available throughout the department and campus. The central library is well-stocked with textbooks, reference books, journals, and digital resources. It also offers a quiet and comfortable environment for studying and research.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: LJ College is one of the best colleges for MBA.

content.Placements: Many students have been placed from this institute in very good companies. The percentage of students placed in this college is 75%. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Kotak, HFFC, ITC, and Narmada. 80% of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and the MBA course is also good to pursue. I recommend the college. The canteen food is delicious. The labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of facilities is top-notch. There is also a sports ground.
